_comment: InitechOS FLAIR chimera element map -- LOCKED spec-data (CLAUDE.md Rule 8).
Ref: PRD Sec 6.3 (Toolbox chrome), PRD Appendix A (the frame).
ADR-0004 D-3 (Manager decomposition, Photoshop menu bar canon),
AM-4 (canon as frozen locked-data), Sec 5.2 FO-2.
Source: docs/research/gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4 + Sec 4.2 (11-element table).
beads: initech-fb47 (this file), initech-k8o5.9 (chrome_metrics v1 uplift),
initech-zaqj (canon -- Photoshop string + hourglass bytes FROZEN).
Rule 8 deliberate act: authored 2026-06-19 from gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.2.
Rule 12: ASCII-clean. No smart quotes, no non-ASCII.
IMPORTANT: element 9 (Photoshop menu items) references the frozen string
owned by beads initech-zaqj. The string is NOT duplicated here as a mutable
data field -- it is referenced by bead ID and ADR-0004 D-3 to prevent
independent drift. The canon oracle (ADR-0004 D-8) gates those frozen bytes.
origin values: 'mac-system7' | 'win31-accent' | 'chimera-intentional'
mac-system7       -- standard System 7.0/7.1 chrome element
win31-accent      -- Windows 3.1 flat 2-D accent (NOT Win95 CTL3D)
chimera-intentional -- deliberate anachronism / impossible combination;
FROZEN by canon oracle; do NOT 'correct'
schema_version_note: v2 (2026-06-21, beads initech-v94x.1): P0-a Law-3 fix -- win31_accent_colors.highlight changed from #dfdfdf (Win95 COLOR_3DLIGHT, forbidden) to #ffffff (Win 3.1 COLOR_BTNHIGHLIGHT). Rule 8 deliberate act. Ref: ../win31-decomp/specs/chrome/cross-version-guardrails.md Sec 2.2 + ../win31-decomp/specs/chrome/button-bevel.md Sec 1.

_comment: Windows 3.1 flat 2-D chrome accent colors (NOT Win95 CTL3D heavy bevel).
Source: gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.1 (Win 3.1 WIN.INI [colors] defaults,
socket3.wordpress.com pre-Win95 flatness, Wikipedia/KB Q84169).
NOTE: ALL Windows pixel heights (SM_CYCAPTION / SM_CXVSCROLL) are
golden-resolves -- do NOT use web-claimed values; measure from DOSBox-X.
See spec/chrome_metrics.json golden_resolves.win31_sm_cycaption/sm_cxvscroll.
win31_accent_colors.title_bar_active_note: navy blue; caption text is white
win31_accent_colors.highlight_provenance: COLOR_BTNHIGHLIGHT (index 20) = #FFFFFF (pure white) in Windows 3.1. The previous value #dfdfdf was Win 95 COLOR_3DLIGHT (index 22), which does NOT exist in Win 3.1 (COLOR_* indices 0..20 only). FORBIDDEN per ../win31-decomp/specs/chrome/cross-version-guardrails.md Sec 2.2 ('COLOR_3DLIGHT (#DFDFDF) -- FORBIDDEN in Win 3.1') and ../win31-decomp/specs/chrome/button-bevel.md Sec 1 ('If you see #DFDFDF in a Win 3.1 spec claim, reject it -- Win95 artifact'). Fix: beads initech-v94x.1 (P0-a Law-3 bug, 2026-06-21). Rule 8 deliberate spec change.

elements.rendering: Alternating 1 px light/dark scanlines, 19 px tall (minTitleH) or 21 px with small icon (minTitleHIcon). Chicago 12 white centered text. Shade indices wTitleBarLight=7 and wTitleBarDark=8 (wctb resource ID -4096); exact RGB values are golden-resolves (beads pvo4).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (minTitleH EQU 19, minTitleHIcon EQU 21, wTitleBarLight EQU 7, wTitleBarDark EQU 8) -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html

elements.rendering: 13 px tall frame square (WBoxDelta calculation: (titleHeight-13)/2 for vertical centering), hollow, 1 px border, positioned ~8 px from left edge of title bar. Rendered interior appearance is golden-resolves (beads pvo4).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (WBoxDelta = (titleHeight-13)/2; hit zone 'sub.w #13,D0 / add.w #11,D0') -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html

elements.rendering: Same vertical dimensions and centering as close box (uses WBoxDelta). Positioned ~20 px from right edge of title bar (WDEF hit zone: -19 to -9 from right = 10 px wide, ~20 px from right). Rendered interior appearance is golden-resolves (beads pvo4).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (PlotZoom code; hit zone cmp.w #-19,D0 / cmp.w #-9,D0) -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html

elements.rendering: 16 px wide control rect (scrollBarSize EQU 16). Right 1 px overlaps the 1 px window frame, presenting 15 px of added width past the content area. Contains arrow buttons at top/bottom, pattern-fill track, and thumb. Arrow and thumb rendering details are golden-resolves (beads pvo4).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (scrollBarSize EQU 16) -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html; brief-corroborated by Inside Macintosh Toolbox Essentials Toolbox-313 kScrollbarWidth

elements.rendering: 1 px outer line + 1 px inner groove = classic Mac double-line frame (visually 2 px wide, not the Win 3.1 2-layer beveled border). documentProc drop shadow is 1 px at offset (1,1).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (FrameRect inset, shadow: 'move.l OneOne,D4 / tst.w varCodeReg / beq.s @1') -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html; brief-corroborated by Inside Macintosh Toolbox Essentials Toolbox-313 '1-pixel-wide window frame'

elements.rendering: 16x16 px square at bottom-right corner, inset scrollBarSize-2 (14 px) from content rect edges (2 px overlap with each scrollbar). Exact fill pattern (2D hash / hatching) is golden-resolves (beads pvo4).
elements.source: StandardWDEF.a (grow box: 'sub.w #scrollBarSize-2,top(rectReg)'; scrollBarSize EQU 16) -- FIRST-HAND VERIFIED 2026-06-19 from https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/samplecode/System_7.0_WDEF/Listings/StandardWDEF_a.html; brief-corroborated by Inside Macintosh Toolbox Essentials Toolbox-313

elements.rendering: Solid fill, Chicago 12 pt, 20 px tall (GetMBarHeight, Roman script). The specific fill color at indexed-8 depth is governed by spec/assets/palette.json (menubar_bg) pending FO-3 reconciliation (beads initech-ch81).

The Apple logo (solid apple silhouette) rendered in Chicago 12 as a special glyph character (0x14 in Mac Roman encoding). Leftmost item in the menu bar. Clean-room glyph is hand-authored in spec/assets/chicago8x16.h.
elements.source: docs/research/gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.2; ADR-0004 D-3. Chicago 12 Apple glyph: Mac Roman 0x14, hand-authored in spec/assets/chicago8x16.h (CLAUDE.md hallucination-risk: glyphs are hand-authored, not pixel-extracted from the frame).

elements.rendering: Mac-located top menu bar (System 7 style, Chicago 12), but the item set is the Photoshop-style string: see frozen constant owned by beads initech-zaqj and ADR-0004 D-3. Rendered in the Mac menu bar, not a Windows caption.
elements.frozen_string_owner: beads initech-zaqj (ADR-0004 D-3 / AM-4 / Sec 5.2 FO-E)
elements.frozen_string_note: The exact menu string 'File Edit Image Layer Select View Window Help' is FROZEN locked-data owned exclusively by beads initech-zaqj and ADR-0004 D-3. It is NOT duplicated here to prevent independent drift. The canon oracle (ADR-0004 D-8) gates those frozen bytes. Do NOT 'correct' it to match any real Photoshop version.
elements.why_chimera: This menu set is historically impossible as a single Photoshop version: Photoshop 3.0 for Mac (Sept 1994, first with Layer menu) had 'Mode' where the frame shows 'View'; 'View' arrived in a later point release. The impossible combination IS the canon -- it reproduces the Office Space prop verbatim. Ref: gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.3; ADR-0004 D-3; CLAUDE.md Law 4.
elements.source: docs/research/gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.2, Sec 4.3; ADR-0004 D-3 / AM-4; PRD Sec 1, Appendix A

elements.rendering: Gray #c0c0c0 face, flat 1 px bevel (NOT Mac rounded-rect, NOT Win95 CTL3D deep bevel). Windows 3.1 flat 2-D style. Button dimensions are golden-resolves for exact pixel heights (beads 77wz; SM_CYCAPTION / DOSBox-X measurement required).
elements.source: docs/research/gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.1 (Win 3.1 WIN.INI [colors] defaults; socket3.wordpress.com pre-Win95 flatness); gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.2 element 10

elements.rendering: Windows 3.1 MDI child window pattern where present: flat 2-D, navy (#000080) active caption, gray (#808080) inactive caption, System font caption text. Pixel heights are golden-resolves (beads 77wz).
elements.source: docs/research/gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.1 (Win 3.1 WIN.INI [colors], Wikipedia/KB Q84169); gui-ground-truth.md Sec 4.2 element 11
